ext.description: A VSCode extension for line-by-line text processing. Add single/double quotes to each line, or append trailing commas (except last non-empty line). Right-click context menu integration with support for selected text or entire file.
desc.wrapSingle: Wrap each line with single quotes
desc.wrapDouble: Wrap each line with double quotes
desc.addComma: Add comma at end of each line (except last non-empty)
desc.join: Join all lines with commas into one line
desc.split: Split comma-separated text into multiple lines
